title: 4/5/2026 | God of the Impossible
questions: Think of a time you had to take a 'leap of faith' without knowing the outcome. What made you decide to trust the process (or person) involved?"
Read James 2:10. Read Romans 3:23. In light of these verses, how would you describe the 'human predicament'? Why is the standard of perfection so difficult for us to accept?
Read Romans 6:23 and Ephesians 2:8. In your own words, how does God’s grace change things?

Read Luke 24:1-12. In Luke 24, the women went to the tomb expecting a body, but the tomb was empty. What does the angels' question— “Why do you look for the living among the dead?’—suggest about how we often look for hope in the wrong places?

Read 1 Corinthians 15:3-6. Why does the 'early' nature of this report—and the fact that women (whose testimony wasn't legally valid at the time) were the primary witnesses—make the account more credible to a skeptic? What else stands out to you?

Pastor Matt noted that the resurrection is a historical claim inviting us to 'weigh the evidence.' When you look at the totality of Jesus' life, death, and the empty tomb, what is the biggest 'stumbling block' or 'building block' for your own faith? Have you come to the point of leaning towards belief? If you are on the fence, what steps might you take to investigate the claims of the resurrection?

If we believe God has the power to conquer death itself, nothing is impossible for Him. As you think about your life, is there an area (a habit, relationship, fear, etc.) that you most need His transformative power to touch this week? How can we find hope in the remembering that the impossible becomes possible with Jesus?

sections.title: Pray
sections.body: Pray that we may grow in understanding how deeply loved we are by an all-powerful God. Pray that we may grow in recognizing who God is and that we may be moved by the evidence of the death and resurrection of Jesus. As we continue to reflect on this message, pray that we would be transformed more into the image of Jesus.

sections.title: Next Steps
sections.body: Check out the resources page for links to several Bible reading plans and other helpful tools. Explore other opportunities for growth and transformation by checking out courses.
